name: 5 MG Finasteride Tablets IP
about: 5 MG Finasteride Tablets IP is a highly effective medication used to treat benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), a condition in which the prostate gland becomes enlarged and causes problems with urination. The medication is also prescribed to treat male pattern baldness. Each tablet contains 5mg of Finasteride, a potent drug that inhibits the production of dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone responsible for prostate enlargement and hair loss. These tablets are manufactured in India and are available in a pack of 30 tablets. The recommended dosage of the medication should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. These tablets are easy to swallow and have a long shelf life.

faq.q: What is 5 MG Finasteride Tablets IP used for?
faq.a: 5 MG Finasteride Tablets IP is used to treat benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) and male pattern baldness.

faq.q: How should I take this medication?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of the medication should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What are the side effects of this medication?
faq.a: Some common side effects of this medication include decreased sex drive, impotence, breast tenderness or enlargement, and ejaculation disorders. Consult your doctor if you experience any of these side effects.

faq.q: How should I store this medication?
faq.a: Store this medication in a cool and dry place, away from direct sunlight and moisture.

faq.q: Is this medication safe to use?
faq.a: Yes, this medication is safe to use when taken as per the doctors suggestion. However, it may cause some side effects in some people. Consult your doctor before taking this medication.
